title: osmanthus × burkwoodii
intro: Osmanthus × burkwoodii, also known as Burkwood osmanthus, is a hybrid flowering plant in the osmanthus genus, resulting from the cross between Osmanthus heterophyllus and Osmanthus delavayi. This plant is valued for its fragrant flowers and foliage, as well as its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Osmanthus × burkwoodii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Osmanthus × burkwoodii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
